en: This collection includes 4 drawings from the Haft Owrang (Seven Thrones) manuscript of the Persian poet Nezami Ganjavi, which was commissioned by the Timurid prince Ibrahim Sultan in the early 15th century. The Haft Owrang is a collection of seven narrative poems that are considered masterpieces of Persian literature. The drawings in this collection depict scenes from these poems and are important examples of Persian miniature painting.
